title: Jungle Animals Coloring Books
subtitle: A Fun Jungle Animals Activity Book for Kids Ages kids

prompts.front: Professional kids coloring book cover, title 'Jungle Animals Coloring Books', cute cartoon animals characters, bright vivid colors, bold typography, clean layout, white background, Amazon KDP style, bestseller design, target age 4-8 Years, high quality illustration, no text overlap, centered composition
prompts.back: Back cover of kids coloring book, simple design, white background, small cute animals illustration, space for book description, barcode placeholder at bottom right, Amazon KDP back cover style
prompts.spine: Book spine design, title 'Jungle Animals Coloring Books', vertical text, colorful background, Amazon KDP spine style
prompts.negative: no blurry images, no watermark, no adult content, no dark themes, no violence, no scary elements, no copyright characters, no text errors
